adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: économie means economy
rule_or_usage: économie 是 economy/经济，法国地理课文里用于讲国家经济结构。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: domaine means domain or field
rule_or_usage: domaine 可按 domain/field 理解，表示某一领域或范围。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: construction means construction industry
rule_or_usage: construction 在课文经济领域里指建筑/建筑业。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: varier is the verb and varié is the adjective
rule_or_usage: varier 是动词“变化”；varié/variée 是形容词“多样的”，课堂里更常用的是形容词义。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: varié means varied not numerous
rule_or_usage: varié 强调种类多样，不等于数量很多；数量很多要另用 nombreux/beaucoup de。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: prédominer means predominate
rule_or_usage: prédominer 表“占据主导地位/占优势”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: principal means main
rule_or_usage: principal/principale 表“主要的”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: occidental means western not accident
rule_or_usage: occidental 是 western/西方的，不要听成或联想到 accident。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: agricole means agricultural
rule_or_usage: agricole 表“农业的”，与 France as an agricultural country 的课文语境连用。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: environ means about
rule_or_usage: environ 表 about/approximately，用于数字或数量前后。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: occuper means occupy
rule_or_usage: occuper 表 occupy/占据，可用于面积、地位或空间。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: vaste means vast
rule_or_usage: vaste 表 vast/广阔的，用于面积、空间、范围。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: industriel needs its full word shape and sound
rule_or_usage: industriel/industrielle 要保留完整词形与读音，不要漏掉中间音节。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: industriel and agricole are key listening words
rule_or_usage: industriel/agricole 是描述国家经济结构的核心词，老师要求背下并能在听力里识别。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: à la fois means at the same time
rule_or_usage: à la fois 表“同时/兼具”，可连接两个身份、性质或动作。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: automobile as automobile industry
rule_or_usage: automobile 在产业语境里可指汽车/汽车制造业。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: quartier means neighborhood
rule_or_usage: quartier 表 neighborhood/district。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: voisin means neighbor
rule_or_usage: voisin 可作名词“邻居”，也会在后文扩展为形容词“相邻的”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: voisin can be noun or adjective
rule_or_usage: voisin 作名词时需要冠词，作形容词时直接修饰名词并配合，如 pays voisins。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: courir present conjugation
rule_or_usage: courir 现在时要按第三组变位记，单数 cours/cours/court，复数 courons/courez/courent。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: s'enrichir means enrich oneself
rule_or_usage: enrichir 是让某物/某人变富或丰富；主语让自己富起来时用代词式 s'enrichir。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: s'enrichir can be literal or figurative
rule_or_usage: s'enrichir 可以指钱上变富，也可引申为精神上更富足。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: ouvrir/offrir/couvrir present uses first-group-like endings
rule_or_usage: ouvrir/offrir/couvrir 一类虽然不是第一组，但现在时词尾像第一组一样处理。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: se baigner is being in water while nager is swimming as a sport
rule_or_usage: nager 更像运动意义的游泳；se baigner 更像下水玩、泡在水里、洗海水浴。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: salle de bains is bathroom built from bath room
rule_or_usage: salle de bains 字面是 bath room，bain 和洗澡/泡澡相关。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: baigner can describe a coast bathed by water
rule_or_usage: baigner 可用于地理表达“被某片水域环抱/濒临”，但不是所有“围绕”都能用。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: entourer is true surround
rule_or_usage: 真正表达被树、警察等围住时用 entourer/être entouré de，而不是 baigner。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: baigner dans la joie means be immersed in joy
rule_or_usage: baigner dans 可抽象表达“沉浸在某种氛围/情绪中”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: prepositions can change a phrase's meaning
rule_or_usage: 看短语不能只看核心词，后面接的介词会改变整块表达的意思。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: cours d'eau means watercourse or river
rule_or_usage: cours d'eau 指河流/水道，是地理描述里的固定名词块。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: Allemagne is masculine but starts with a vowel
rule_or_usage: Allemagne 是国家名，阳性但以元音开头，实际出现时常写 l'Allemagne。

adjudication_note: Reviewed and merged with a true duplicate from the same single-pass inventory.
learner_task: avoir pour voisins means have as neighbors
rule_or_usage: avoir pour voisins 是“有……作为邻居/邻国”的句型，常把 pour voisins 放在长名单前。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: nombre and numéro are different number words
rule_or_usage: English number 可对应 nombre 或 numéro；nombre 是数量，numéro 是编号。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: de nombreux means many
rule_or_usage: de nombreux/nombreuses + 名词 表“许多”，更书面，可和 beaucoup de 对应。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: pomme de terre is potato
rule_or_usage: pomme de terre 表土豆，是听力购物语境里的常见实物词。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: betterave means beet
rule_or_usage: betterave 表甜菜，属于法国农业/作物词汇。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: tabac means tobacco
rule_or_usage: tabac 表烟草。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: élevage means livestock farming
rule_or_usage: élevage 表畜牧业/养殖。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: assez can mean quite when modifying adjectives or adverbs
rule_or_usage: assez 本义是 enough，但修饰形容词/副词时常可理解成“相当/挺/很”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: les immigrés means immigrants
rule_or_usage: les immigrés 指移到国外生活/工作的人，在法国移民话题里是核心词。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: poser des problèmes is cause problems not ask a question
rule_or_usage: poser une question 是向人提问；poser des problèmes 是造成/带来问题，problem 是难题不是 question。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: donner lieu à means give rise to
rule_or_usage: donner lieu à 是较高级的“引发/导致”，可和 causer 对应。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: travailleur immigré means immigrant worker
rule_or_usage: travailleur immigré 可理解为 immigrant worker。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: dur can describe hard or difficult work
rule_or_usage: dur/dure 作形容词可表示工作艰苦、困难。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: mal payé means poorly paid
rule_or_usage: mal payé 是 well-paid 的反义，用副词 mal + 过去分词 payé 构成，形容工作工资不高。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: main-d'œuvre means workforce
rule_or_usage: main-d'œuvre 表 workforce/劳动力。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: patron means boss or employer
rule_or_usage: patron 表老板/雇主。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: qui que où relative pronoun recap
rule_or_usage: qui 代替从句主语，que 代替直接宾语，où 引导地点或时间。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: demonstrative pronouns agree with the replaced noun
rule_or_usage: 指示代词按被替代名词的阴阳性和单复数选择 celui/celle/ceux/celles。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: celui celle ceux celles cannot stand bare
rule_or_usage: celui/celle/ceux/celles 后面必须有一个限定尾巴，不能光秃秃地单独成分使用。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: celui de and celle de replace repeated nouns
rule_or_usage: 用 celui de/celle de 可以替代重复名词，如 mon vélo -> celui de Pascal，ma voiture -> celle de Pascal。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: demonstrative pronouns can be limited by a relative clause
rule_or_usage: 除了 de/介词短语，celui/celle/ceux/celles 后也可以跟 qui/que/où 等关系从句做限定。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: infer noun gender from exercise clues
rule_or_usage: 练习时不一定每次查字典，可以利用 mon/ma/ta 等题目提示判断名词性别，从而选 celui/celle。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: ceux qui can mean people who without antecedent
rule_or_usage: ceux qui/celui qui 可不替代前文名词，直接指“某一类人”，但不能指物；单复数都可泛指一类人，动词变位要配清楚。

adjudication_note: Reviewed and merged with a true duplicate from the same single-pass inventory.
learner_task: celui-ci and celui-là are like the one here and the one there
rule_or_usage: celui-ci/celle-ci 表近指“这一个”，celui-là/celle-là 表远指“那一个”，很像英文 the one here/there。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: do not use celui alone after a which-one question
rule_or_usage: 别人问“哪一个”时，不能只答 Je veux celui/celle；后面必须补 celui-ci/celui-là 或其他限定。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: neutral ce has no gender or number
rule_or_usage: 中性 ce 不随后面名词阴阳性或单复数变化；作主语时常见 c'est/ce sont。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: ce que includes a special antecedent plus que
rule_or_usage: que 只是关系代词，需要已有先行词；ce que 是特殊先行词 ce 加 que，用来表达“什么/所……的东西”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: ce que is object what and ce qui is subject what
rule_or_usage: ce que 中 ce 在从句里作直宾；ce qui 中 ce 在从句里作主语。法语必须分清 what 是主语还是宾语。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: faire plaisir à quelqu'un means make someone happy
rule_or_usage: X fait plaisir à Y 表 X makes Y happy。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: use verb conjugation to decide ce que versus ce qui
rule_or_usage: 做 ce que/ce qui 填空时，看从句动词变位：如果后面动词把 ce 当主语，就用 ce qui；如果已有主语而缺宾语，就用 ce que。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: énerver means annoy and can be pronominal
rule_or_usage: X énerve Y 表 X 让 Y 烦；自己烦躁可用 s'énerver/Je m'énerve。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: amuser means amuse and s'amuser means have fun
rule_or_usage: X amuse Y 表 X 逗乐 Y；Je m'amuse 表我玩得开心。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: révolter means outrage or revolt
rule_or_usage: ce qui me révolte le plus 表“最让我愤慨的东西”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: injustice means unfairness
rule_or_usage: injustice 表“不公/不公平”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
french_items: ce qui me fait peur, c'est
ce que j'aime le plus, c'est
learner_task: ce qui ce que can form what-cleft sentences
rule_or_usage: ce qui/ce que ... c'est ... 可以表达“……的是……”，功能接近英文 what makes me... is...。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: future simple is a simple tense without auxiliary
rule_or_usage: futur simple 里的 simple 指“简单时态”，动词自己变，不像复合过去时那样需要助动词。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: future simple is stem plus ending
rule_or_usage: 简单将来时按“词根 + 词尾”掌握：前半是固定词根，后半是固定词尾。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: first-group future stem is the infinitive
rule_or_usage: 第一组动词 futur simple 的词根就是动词不定式，再接将来时词尾。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: future endings come from avoir forms
rule_or_usage: futur simple 的词尾可按 avoir 的一组变位来记，尤其 -ai 发 /e/ 或 a 类尾音，不要按字母乱读。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: parlerai weakens the internal er sound
rule_or_usage: 第一组动词加将来时词尾后，原来词尾的 -er 进入中间位置，读音要弱化带过；vous parlerez 和 vous parlez 要读出区别。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: second-group future stem is also infinitive
rule_or_usage: 第二组动词 futur simple 也用不定式作词根，再加将来时词尾。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: third-group -re future drops final e
rule_or_usage: 第三组中以 -re 结尾且不属于极特殊词根的动词，futur simple 常去掉最后 e 再加词尾。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: irregular future stems must be memorized
rule_or_usage: 一些常用第三组动词的 futur simple 词根是规定好的，只能背；记一个人称即可推全套词尾。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: future stems matter beyond futur simple
rule_or_usage: 不规则将来时词根不只用于 futur simple，后面至少还会用于条件式等时态，所以要提前背熟。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: ça ira is ça va in future simple
rule_or_usage: ça ira 可理解为 ça va 的 futur simple：it will be OK / it will work。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: futur simple maps to will do and futur proche maps to be going to do
rule_or_usage: futur simple 大致对应 will do；aller + infinitif/futur proche 大致对应 be going to do，二者差别更多是语感。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: falloir and pleuvoir only use third person singular
rule_or_usage: falloir 和 pleuvoir 这类无人称动词只用第三人称单数，所以将来时也写 il faudra / il pleuvra。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: la guerre means war
rule_or_usage: la guerre 表 war/战争。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: le développement means development
rule_or_usage: développement 表 development/发展，是社会经济话题高频名词。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: les médias means media
rule_or_usage: les médias 表 media/媒体，通常以复数出现。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: isolement means isolation
rule_or_usage: isolement 表 isolation/隔离、孤立。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: le progrès means progress
rule_or_usage: progrès 表 progress/进步。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: le transport and une autoroute are transport vocabulary
rule_or_usage: transport 表交通/运输；autoroute 表高速公路。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: une eau douce means fresh water
rule_or_usage: eau douce 表 fresh water/淡水。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: la liaison means connection or link
rule_or_usage: liaison 表 connection/link，也可指语言里的连诵，但此处是一般连接义。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: le réseau means network
rule_or_usage: réseau 表 network/网络。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: la décentralisation means decentralization
rule_or_usage: décentralisation 表 decentralization/地方分权或去中心化。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: l'ordre du jour means agenda
rule_or_usage: ordre du jour 表 agenda/议事日程。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: le pouvoir means power
rule_or_usage: pouvoir 作名词 le pouvoir 表 power/权力；也可和动词 pouvoir 区分。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: une activité and le festival are activity/event words
rule_or_usage: activité 表活动；festival 表节庆/艺术节，老师明确说 festival 之类要背。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: le théâtre means theater
rule_or_usage: théâtre 表 theater/剧院或戏剧，复数 les théâtres。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: pays paysage paysan look similar but mean different things
rule_or_usage: pays, paysage, paysan 词形相近、发音特殊，但意思分别是国家、风景、农民，需要一起对比记。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
french_items: Il y a de très beaux paysages
learner_task: il y a de très beaux paysages
rule_or_usage: 描述加拿大等地方吸引人的风景时，可用 Il y a de très beaux paysages 或 Le paysage est très beau。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: au milieu de means in the middle of
rule_or_usage: 表达“在……中间”用 au milieu de；de 后若接 le 要缩合成 du。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: actuellement means currently
rule_or_usage: actuellement 表 currently/目前。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: certes means certainly or admittedly
rule_or_usage: certes 可作让步/确认连接词，表示 certainly/admittedly。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: à côté de means next to
rule_or_usage: à côté de 表 next to/beside。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: aller et retour means round trip
rule_or_usage: aller et retour 表 round trip/往返。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: volontiers means gladly
rule_or_usage: volontiers 表 gladly/willingly，常用于礼貌回答。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: opposer X à Y means oppose or set X against Y
rule_or_usage: opposer X à Y 是把 X 和 Y 对立起来；反对某事可理解为把自己和它对立起来，所以用 s'opposer à。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
french_items: tirer les paysans de la pauvreté
learner_task: tirer X de Y and se tirer de mean pull out or get out of
rule_or_usage: tirer X de Y 字面像 pull something from something；se tirer de 表把自己从困境中摆脱出来。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: pauvreté means poverty
rule_or_usage: pauvreté 表 poverty/贫困。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: permettre can mean make possible
rule_or_usage: permettre 不只表示允许，也可表示“使……成为可能”，如 la communication permet le développement de l'économie。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
french_items: permettre à quelqu'un de faire quelque chose
learner_task: permettre à quelqu'un de faire quelque chose
rule_or_usage: 允许某人做某事用 permettre à quelqu'un de faire quelque chose；à les 要缩合成 aux。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: rentrer à la maison means go home
rule_or_usage: rentrer à la maison 表回家。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: avant and après mark before and after
rule_or_usage: avant dix heures 表十点之前，après dix heures 表十点之后。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: disposer de equals avoir and needs de
rule_or_usage: disposer de 等于 avoir/拥有，但必须带 de。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: avoir lieu means take place and uses event subject
rule_or_usage: avoir lieu 表举行/发生，主语应是事件/活动本身，不能用 on 来说“我们举行”。

adjudication_note: Reviewed against the single comprehensive L20 source pass; retained for pedagogical value.
learner_task: L20 homework is future tense and demonstrative pronoun exercises plus vocabulary
rule_or_usage: 课后作业是完成今天的将来时和指示代词语法练习，并背单词。

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
french_items: La France s'étend sur environ 551 000 kilomètres carrés
learner_task: state the area covered by a country or region
rule_or_usage: s'étendre sur + surface/area expresses that a place covers a stated area, followed directly by the measurement.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
learner_task: read and form square-metre or square-kilometre measurements
rule_or_usage: Area units use carré after the unit noun and agree in number: un kilomètre carré, des kilomètres carrés; km² is read kilomètres carrés.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
learner_task: say a little or much more or less
rule_or_usage: Place un peu or beaucoup before plus/moins + adjective to scale a comparison: un peu plus vaste, beaucoup plus vaste, un peu moins vaste.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
french_items: Il fait aussi froid à Pékin qu'à Shanghai
learner_task: compare weather conditions in two places
rule_or_usage: Build the weather clause with il fait, then compare locations: Il fait aussi froid à Pékin qu'à Shanghai.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
learner_task: reduce complex production by building the sentence core first
rule_or_usage: For a difficult comparison, first produce the core clause (for example il fait froid à Pékin), then add the comparison marker and second location.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
learner_task: recognize and produce the fixed concept Western Europe
rule_or_usage: Europe occidentale is the established expression for Western Europe; occidentale is the feminine form agreeing with Europe.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
learner_task: prioritize reusable language from a dense reading
rule_or_usage: The teacher explicitly deprioritized isolated geography trivia and asked the learner to retain reusable sentence frames, listening keywords, and productive expressions.

adjudication_note: Added during rubric reconciliation after the single comprehensive source pass.
learner_task: practice the complete demonstrative-pronoun phrase
rule_or_usage: Say the full phrase, including the required complement, so partial muscle memory does not produce bare celui/celle.
